# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create a simple GitHub Actions workflow for our application CI. On every push, install dependencies, run unit tests, build the application, and deploy to our staging environment. Focus on speed - we want fast feedback for developers. We'll add security scanning later.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Deploy To Staging
    # This workflow will do a clean install of node dependencies, cache/restore them, build the source code and run tests across different versions of node
    on: push

    jobs:
      build-and-deploy:
        runs-on: ubuntu-latest

        steps:
          - uses: actions/checkout@v2

          # Set up our environment for all actions
          - name: Setup Node.js
            uses: actions/setup-node@v1
            with:
              node-version: 14.x

          # Install dependencies and run tests
          - name: npm install, npm test, and lerna bootstrap
            run: |
              npm install --legacy-peer-deps
              npm test
              npx lerna bootstrap --hoist
